span.p:
run_dj_set_mode()
Main function to manage the process

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
curate_setlist()
The 'AI DJ' that analyzes compatibility (key, BPM, energy) and orders the tracks

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
create_continuous_mix_from_setlist()
Builds the final continuous mix as a single MP3 file

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
analyze_audio_local()
Analyzes a song's BPM, key, and energy

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
analyze_structure()
Finds the song's structure, like intros and outros

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
analyze_vocal_presence()
Detects if a song has vocals

analysis_cache.json
(Saves analysis results to speed up future runs)
